subject: Toxel, a small purple baby Pokemon with lightning-bolt-shaped ears and a round body
description: A small, round purple creature stands in a slightly bouncy, endearing pose. It has distinctively jagged lightning-bolt-shaped appendages on its head serving as ears, a large round light-colored belly, and tiny stubby limbs. Its expression is neutral to slightly grumpy. The art background is a warm yellow-orange gradient with small floating elements, giving the card a cheerful electric-type energy feel. The overall rendering is soft and clean in classic Pokemon TCG style.
foreground: Small round purple creature with lightning-bolt ears and pale belly
background: Warm yellow-orange gradient background with small decorative elements
emotion: Neutral to slightly grumpy; compact bouncy posture suggests baby energy
